prose_input.body_excerpt: During our inspection of your drug manufacturing facility, we observed significant violations of Current Good Manufacturing Practice (CGMP) regulations. Specifically, your firm failed to establish adequate written procedures for production and process controls.
prose_input.headline: CGMP for finished pharmaceuticals
prose_input.issue_or_reason: During our inspection of your drug manufacturing facility, we observed significant violations of Current Good Manufacturing Practice (CGMP) regulations. Specifically, your firm failed to establish adequate written procedures for production and process controls.
